subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which fort was built by Maharaja Jai Singh II?
question_hi: महाराजा जैसिंग सी एक्सॉस के निर्माण की मोटी।
explanation_en:
Maharaja Jai Singh II is known for constructing the Amber Fort.
In the 17th century, he chose Amber as his capital and made it the seat of the Mughal Empire in Rajasthan.
Jaipur Fort is actually the seat of the Rajasthan government today.
explanation_hi:
महाराजा जैसिंग सी 17वेंची समय, अमर्ह मोटी को इस्पाती है मोगों के भवन को निर्माण के लिए।
